name: QR Gem Generator
summary: The ultimate internal QR code generator. Fast, clean, and locally hosted for maximum privacy.
description: QR Gem is our bespoke internal tool for creating high-quality QR codes for use in marketing, creative projects, and quick data sharing. It features instant generation, multiple export formats, and zero-tracking for your peace of mind. Built by Juelz-101 for the ZIKYinc crew.

behind_the_scenes.concept: Needed a way to generate links for our physical posters without relying on expensive third-party 'premium' generators.
